use_cases: Display an engaging loading animation while content is being fetched or processed
Indicate progress during form submissions or data synchronization
Show background processing status in dashboards or applications
Provide visual feedback during async operations in web applications
Add a decorative loading indicator to onboarding or setup flows
ai_summary: A gooey-style blob loader component that creates an organic, flowing animation effect using SVG filters and CSS. Features theme-aware color customization with primary, secondary, and border color props. The component uses feGaussianBlur and feColorMatrix filters to achieve the characteristic liquid/blob appearance. Accessible with proper ARIA labels and role attributes. Designed for seamless integration into any shadcn-based application as a standalone loading indicator.
